NeonStore.Title: QuoteTile
NeonStore.Subtitle: Seek inspiration from quotes
NeonStore.Description: QuoteTile is a simple app that shows inspiring quotes. Refresh quotes anytime, copy quotes to clipboard with one click, and share quotes anywhere.

NeonStore.Title: QuoteTile LTS
NeonStore.Subtitle: Seek inspiration from quotes
NeonStore.Description: QuoteTile is a simple app that shows inspiring quotes. Refresh quotes anytime, copy quotes to clipboard with one click, and share quotes anywhere.

NeonStore.Title: GDC Media Player
NeonStore.Subtitle: Vibe-cooling media player
NeonStore.Description: A lightweight and modern audio player designed for music lovers. Clean UI, smooth playback, and efficient performance.

NeonStore.Title: GDC Highlights
NeonStore.Subtitle: Latest news from GDC
NeonStore.Description: Stay updated with the latest GDC news, releases, and community highlights in one place.

NeonStore.Title: ChrisRLillo Music
NeonStore.Subtitle: Chilean music in its peak
NeonStore.Description: Discover music, updates, and exclusive content from ChrisRLillo.

NeonStore.Title: Neon Notes
NeonStore.Subtitle: Write and share!
NeonStore.Description: Neon Notes is a tile-based note-taking app inspired by the Windows 8 Start screen.

NeonStore.Title: Live Text 8.1
NeonStore.Subtitle: Personalized live tiles
NeonStore.Description: Live Text is a Windows 10/8.1/8/Phone 8.1/8/7 that combines the best of live tiles and the Quotes/Texts, You can customize it like your way, pin the app to get the live tile, and you can write your own text instead of letting a quote take the place.

NeonStore.Title: OctoStore
NeonStore.Subtitle: Windows 8.1 Store, revived
NeonStore.Description: OctoStore is a 8Store Fork that has some new features that makes it even better. It tries to continue the same goal 8Store had, with the same passions.

OtherPlatforms.Title: NeonEdge
OtherPlatforms.Subtitle: Edge, remade
OtherPlatforms.Description: NeonEdge is a lightweight browser remade in the style of the old Edge. It’s fast, simple, and built for a clean modern browsing experience while keeping that familiar classic feel.

OtherPlatforms.Title: DrayMusic for Android
OtherPlatforms.Subtitle: The DraydenYT Music App!
OtherPlatforms.Description: Listen online anytime, anywhere with DrayMusic and enjoy seamless access to your favorite tracks, curated playlists, and new music discoveries all in one place.

OtherPlatforms.Title: QuoteTileWP8
OtherPlatforms.Subtitle: Seek inspiration from quotes
OtherPlatforms.Description: QuoteTile is a simple app that shows inspiring quotes. Refresh quotes anytime you like. Save your favorites and build your personal collection.

OtherPlatforms.Title: GDCHWP8
OtherPlatforms.Subtitle: Latest news from GDC
OtherPlatforms.Description: Stay updated with the latest GDC news, releases, and community highlights in one place.

OtherPlatforms.Title: ConverterCalculatorGUI
OtherPlatforms.Subtitle: Scientific Calculator
OtherPlatforms.Description: A lightweight Windows application combining a scientific calculator and a currency converter. Built in C# WinForms, it’s perfect for everyday calculations and quick currency conversions.

OtherPlatforms.Title: Aero Quotes
OtherPlatforms.Subtitle: Quotes, Aerofied
OtherPlatforms.Description: This app displays a quote in an Aero Glass–style window using your system’s accent color or Mica effect, and fetches quotes from the Quotable API. It’s written in AutoHotkey v2.
